# Help === XB DESIGN NOTES === editor renderer ocx (output context) document_manager activity_manager command_manager settings --- locus of activity management candidates: - XbManager.singleton - ocx - renderer - cell - output_element choose: XbManager.singleton and ocx --- "cell" elements - id - css class: "cell" - dataset attributes: -- type: media-type, e.g., "text/plain", "text/html", "text/javascipt", "text/typescript", "application/json", "text/x-tex", "text/x-latex", ... "output" elements - class: "output" (necessary?) - dataset attributes: -- source-element: source element (cell) id -- source-media-type see: https://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml --- alternative terms: renderer, translator, converter, interpreter, compiler, evaluator --- reactive? typescript? Signals? immutable? virtual dom? ---

Help

=== XB DESIGN NOTES ===

editor renderer ocx (output context)

document_manager activity_manager command_manager

settings

locus of activity management candidates:

  • XbManager.singleton
  • ocx
  • renderer
  • cell
  • output_element choose: XbManager.singleton and ocx

"cell" elements

  • id
  • css class: "cell"
  • dataset attributes: -- type: media-type, e.g., "text/plain", "text/html", "text/javascipt", "text/typescript", "application/json", "text/x-tex", "text/x-latex", ...

"output" elements

  • class: "output" (necessary?)
  • dataset attributes: -- source-element: source element (cell) id -- source-media-type

see: https://www.iana.org/assignments/media-types/media-types.xhtml

alternative terms: renderer, translator, converter, interpreter, compiler, evaluator

reactive? typescript? Signals?

immutable? virtual dom?

Help
